title: Hot Touch of Summer rugby tournament returns to Mossel Bay
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The annual Hot Summer of Touch touch rugby tournament returns to Mossel Bay tomorrow, 27 December.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The annual Hot Summer of Touch touch rugby tournament returns to Mossel Bay tomorrow, 27 December."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The tournament's final two legs will take place at Diaz Beach tomorrow and Hartenbos Beach on Monday 29 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is the 25th year the touch rugby tournament has been operational.","html":"This is the 25th year the touch rugby tournament has been operational."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There will be five sections in this year’s series, namely a Pro Series, Challenger Series, an Open Tournament, a Junior Section and a Ladies Section.","html":"There will be five sections in this year’s series, namely a Pro Series, Challenger Series, an Open Tournament, a Junior Section and a Ladies Section."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The latter two sections will be dependent on the number of teams and available space on the beach/field."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Teams typically consist of a maximum of eight players.","html":"Teams typically consist of a maximum of eight players."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 2025 tournament began on Sunday 7 December in Camps Bay, taking place on several other beaches across South Africa including Stilbaai, Strand, Struisbaai, Kleinmond, Macassar, Diaz and Hartenbos Beach.","html":"The 2025 tournament began on Sunday 7 December in Camps Bay, taking place on several other beaches across South Africa including Stilbaai, Strand, Struisbaai, Kleinmond, Macassar, Diaz and Hartenbos Beach."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, visit the Hot Summer of Touch website, hotsummeroftouch.co.za.","html":"For more information, visit the Hot Summer of Touch website, hotsummeroftouch.co.za."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Hot Touch of Summer rugby tournament returns to Mossel Bay
